title: Congratulating the Philadelphia Eagles on their victory in Super Bowl LIX.
plain_summary: This bill is a congratulations message from the US House of Representatives to the Philadelphia Eagles football team. The Eagles won Super Bowl 59 by beating the Kansas City Chiefs with a score of 40 to 22 on February 9, 2025. The House wants to officially recognize and celebrate all the players, coaches, and staff who helped bring this championship trophy to Philadelphia and Pennsylvania.
last_action_text: Sponsor introductory remarks on measure. (CR H622)

sections.title: Resolution Congratulating the Philadelphia Eagles on their victory in Super Bowl LIX
sections.text: This resolution congratulates the Philadelphia Eagles football team for winning Super Bowl fifty-nine. On Sunday, February ninth, two thousand twenty-five, the Philadelphia Eagles beat the Kansas City Chiefs by a score of forty to twenty-two. The game was played at the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans, Louisiana. Jalen Hurts was named the Most Valuable Player (the best player in the game) after he had an amazing performance. He threw a forty-six yard touchdown pass to DeVonta Smith. Hurts threw for two hundred twenty-one yards and ran for seventy-two yards during the game. The team used their famous play called the Brotherly Shove to score another touchdown. Cooper DeJean caught a pass that was meant for the other team when Patrick Mahomes threw it. He ran it back thirty-eight yards and scored a touchdown. The Philadelphia Eagles had to overcome challenges on their way to the Super Bowl. They lost their experienced defensive player Brandon Graham for eight weeks during the regular season. This Super Bowl victory was the result of hard work by the entire Philadelphia Eagles organization, great leadership, and strong support from Eagles fans around the world. Super Bowl fifty-nine brought together more than one hundred million Americans who love football and American culture. Head Coach Nick Sirianni said that football is the ultimate team game and that you cannot be great without the greatness of others. He praised the great performance by everybody on the team. The Philadelphia Eagles represent the spirit of the city of Philadelphia, which is known for hard work, determination, and people working together. The Philadelphia Eagles did an outstanding job bringing the Vince Lombardi Trophy (the Super Bowl championship trophy) to Philadelphia, which is called the City of Brotherly Love, and to the state of Pennsylvania. The House of Representatives congratulates the Philadelphia Eagles on their hard-fought victory in Super Bowl fifty-nine. The House also recognizes the achievements of all the players, coaches, and staff who helped make this victory possible.
